questions.subject: Underground Mining
questions.stem: For a longwall panel of height 4 m and length 120 m, which method of caving is most common in Indian coal mines?
questions.solution: Most Indian longwalls operate with caving allowed behind shields.

questions.subject: Underground Mining
questions.stem: In bord-and-pillar mining, FIRST WORKINGS typically extract what % of the seam?
questions.solution: Typically 20–35% extraction during development; balance recovered during depillaring.

questions.subject: Underground Mining
questions.stem: Longwall face is supported by which type of support?
questions.solution: Modern longwall faces use hydraulic powered roof supports (chock-shields).
